---
title: "Collaborator Analysis"
author: Ramit guha
format: html
---

## Exercise: Explore, Clean, and Wrangle Data

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(here)
```

```{r}
here::here(
  "Data Folder",
  "Time-series of lobster trap buoy counts",
  "Lobster_Trap_Counts_All_Years_20210519.csv"
)
```

```{r}
lobster_traps <- read_csv(
  here::here(
    "Data Folder",
    "Time-series of lobster trap buoy counts",
    "Lobster_Trap_Counts_All_Years_20210519.csv"
  )
)
```

```{r}
lobster_traps <- lobster_traps %>% 
    mutate(TRAPS = na_if(TRAPS, -99999))
```

```{r}
not_napl <- lobster_traps %>% 
    filter(SITE != "NAPL")
```

```{r}
carp_20_traps <- lobster_traps %>% 
    filter(SITE == "CARP" & TRAPS > 20)
```

```{r}
# `group_by() %>% summarize()` practice
max_lobster_traps <- lobster_traps %>% 
    group_by(SITE, MONTH) %>%
    summarize(MAX_TRAPS = max(TRAPS, na.rm = TRUE))
```
